title: Enhancing human gut health: Global innovations in dysbiosis management
authors: El Boukhari R, et al.; Xie L
abstract_en: A broad synthesis of global strategies for managing gut dysbiosis and improving human health.
abstract_zh: 系统总结全球肠道菌群失衡管理与人类健康改善策略。

title: Fecal microbiota as a non-invasive biomarker to predict tissue iron accumulation in intestinal epithelial cells and liver
abstract_en: A microbiome-based approach proposed fecal features as non-invasive indicators of tissue iron accumulation.
abstract_zh: 提出利用粪便微生物特征无创预测肠上皮及肝脏铁积累。
